name: Fudgy Fruitcake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9 by 13 inch baking pan.
3. In a large saucepan, melt butter and chocolate chips together, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and add condensed milk and almond extract.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix in flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Stir in candied fruitcake mixture and chopped walnuts.
8. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared baking pan.
9. Bake for about 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
